process_changes: **R2->R3: Symlink still incomplete + shell:true recurring** (ping-pong)
R2 added lstatSync on file; R3 Qodo flagged ancestor directory + shell:true
**Root cause:** shell:true was "explained away" with comments in R1-R2
**R3->R4: DoS in validation + TOCTOU in file creation** (ping-pong)
R3 added validateSkipReason but length check was after char iteration
**Root cause:** Validation order wasn't optimized (cheap checks first)
**R4->R5: TOCTOU in file creation race** (ping-pong)
R4 added explicit file permissions but via separate existsSync +
**Root cause:** Three separate fs calls = TOCTOU window
**R5->R6: fstatSync gap in fd-based write** (ping-pong)
R5 introduced fd-based write but didn't verify fd points to regular file
**Root cause:** Incremental hardening — each round fixed one layer but not
**SKIP_REASON persistence: rejected consistently R3-R6** (NOT ping-pong)
Qodo compliance re-flagged this every round; rejected each time with same
This is correct behavior — consistent rejection prevents churn

action_items.title: review-metrics dedup + upsert fix
action_items.verify_cmd:
node -e "const l=require('fs').readFileSync('.claude/state/review-metrics.jsonl','utf8').trim().split('
');const ids=l.map(x=>{try{return JSON.parse(x).pr}catch{return null}}).filter(Boolean);const u=new Set(ids);process.exit(u.size===ids.length?0:1)" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

verdict_rationale: Pipeline catching real issues (706 fixes). Rejection rate manageable but CAS/Skills categories need suppression tuning.
process_feedback: Bulk categorized retro more efficient than per-PR for 26 PRs. Key insight: thematic grouping reveals systemic patterns invisible in individual retros.

learnings.insight: CAS handler PRs have 23% rejection rate — skill definition files need review bot suppression
reviews.jsonl had 280 duplicate entries (51% inflation) — caused by multiple JSONL append paths writing the same round
cc-extraction is the most common cross-PR pattern (17 occurrences) — systemic rather than per-PR issue
